name: Coldharbour's Favorite
location: Northern Elsweyr, Valenwood Border Artisan Camp

bonuses.stat:
Healing yourself or a group member summons Coldharbour's Favorite, who after 2 seconds, begins healing you and group members near him for 4648 Health over 6 seconds based on the higher of your Max Magicka or Stamina.

Dealing damage summons Coldharbour's Favorite, who after 2 seconds, explodes, damaging enemies near him for 2352 Magic damage over 6 seconds based on the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.

Coldharbour's Favorite can only be summoned once every 10 seconds.
